tool.name: EnzyWizard Interaction
tool.command: ln -s '$input_path' input.cif && #if $substrate_zip: mkdir -p substrate_dir && unzip -q '$substrate_zip' -d substrate_dir && #end if enzywizard-interaction -i input.cif #if $substrate_names: -s '$substrate_names' #end if #if $substrate_zip: -d substrate_dir #end if -o ./ --hbond_da_max_distance '$hbond_da_max_distance' --hbond_ha_max_distance '$hbond_ha_max_distance' --hbond_angle '$hbond_angle' --ionic_distance_cutoff '$ionic_distance_cutoff' --ppstack_center_distance_cutoff '$ppstack_center_distance_cutoff' --pication_distance_cutoff '$pication_distance_cutoff' --pication_angle_cutoff '$pication_angle_cutoff' --ssbond_max_distance '$ssbond_max_distance'

expand.name: substrate_zip
expand.label: Substrate directory (zip)
expand.help: Optional zip archive containing docked substrate SDF files.

tool.help: Optional substrate directories are supplied as zip datasets and unpacked explicitly inside this wrapper command in the Galaxy job working directory.
